meta.note: Gold document checklist aligned to starter-pack CH-READINESS-001 (60-day evidence). Status is readiness, NOT approval.

items.label: Proof of income (pay stub or benefit letter)
items.description: Income evidence within the 60-day simulation currency window (CH-READINESS-001).

items.label: Household composition statement
items.description: List of all household members and relationships.

items.label: Bank / asset statement
items.description: Account statements within the 60-day evidence window.

items.label: SSN or ITIN documentation
items.description: Tax identifier for each adult household member.
